title: Dev v0.5.7 Feedback Submit Foundation
notes:
Adds the first Feedback / Bug Report page to Dev so users can submit reports to the Master review queue on GitHub.

Changes:
- Adds Feedback tab/button.
- Adds feedback type dropdown.
- Adds related item/page field.
- Adds feedback message box.
- Saves feedback name and token locally.
- Clears saved feedback token.
- Submits feedback reports to GitHub:
  shared-dev/feedback/new/<feedback-id>.json
- Creates local feedback backup in app data.
- Feedback includes app version, channel, submitter, item/page, type, message, and summary.
